title: Coca-Cola Scholars Program
description: Merit-based scholarship for high school seniors who demonstrate leadership, academic excellence, and commitment to community service. 150 awards of $20,000 each.
eligibility: High school senior, US citizen or permanent resident, minimum 3.0 GPA

title: Gates Scholarship
description: Full-ride scholarship for outstanding minority high school seniors from low-income households. Covers full cost of attendance not covered by other financial aid.
eligibility: Pell-eligible, minority, US citizen or permanent resident, high school senior

title: Dell Scholars Program
description: $20,000 scholarship plus support services for students who have overcome significant obstacles to pursue higher education.
eligibility: Participating program student, GPA 2.4+, US citizen or permanent resident

title: Ronald McDonald House Charities Scholarship
description: Scholarships for graduating high school seniors. Awards vary by chapter; national program offers significant support.
eligibility: High school senior, under 21, legal US resident, eligible to attend 2- or 4-year college

title: Elks Most Valuable Student Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for high school seniors. 500 four-year scholarships ranging from $4,000 to $50,000.
eligibility: High school senior, US citizen, planning to attend accredited US college

title: Foot Locker Scholar Athletes
description: $20,000 scholarship for high school seniors who excel in sports, academics, and community. 20 winners annually.
eligibility: High school senior, involved in sports, 3.0+ GPA, US resident

title: Buick Achievers Scholarship
description: Scholarships for first-generation college students pursuing STEM or business-related fields. Awards up to $25,000.
eligibility: High school senior or undergrad, plan to major in STEM or business, US/Canada

title: Cameron Impact Scholarship
description: Full-ride, four-year scholarship for high school seniors who demonstrate leadership, community service, and academic excellence.
eligibility: High school senior, US citizen, planning to enroll full-time at 4-year college

title: QuestBridge National College Match
description: Full four-year scholarship (tuition, room & board) for low-income high school seniors to top colleges. Partner colleges include Stanford, MIT, Yale.
eligibility: High school senior, US citizen or permanent resident, from low-income family

title: Posse Foundation Scholarship
description: Full-tuition leadership scholarship. Students are selected in diverse teams (Posses) and attend partner colleges together.
eligibility: High school senior, nominated by school or community-based organization, in a Posse city

title: Horatio Alger Scholarship
description: Need-based scholarships for students who have overcome adversity. National and state programs; awards up to $25,000.
eligibility: High school senior, critical financial need, US citizen, 2.0+ GPA

title: Jack Kent Cooke Foundation College Scholarship
description: Up to $55,000 per year for high-achieving high school seniors with financial need. Covers tuition, living expenses, books.
eligibility: High school senior, 3.5+ GPA, significant financial need, US citizen or permanent resident

title: RMHC/HACER Scholarship
description: Scholarships for Hispanic students. Over $1.7 million awarded annually through local RMHC chapters.
eligibility: High school senior, at least one parent of Hispanic heritage, US legal resident

title: Equality Scholarship (EQ) by Ted Rollins
description: Scholarship for students who have faced hardship and demonstrate resilience. Focus on first-generation and underrepresented students.
eligibility: Enrolled or enrolling in accredited US college, demonstrated financial need

title: Stamps Scholarship
description: Merit-based full-ride scholarship at partner universities. Includes enrichment funds for study abroad, research, and leadership.
eligibility: Apply through partner universities; typically top 1% of applicants

title: Gillette Venus Grow Your Own Scholarship
description: Scholarships for women pursuing education and growth. Multiple awards for undergraduate and graduate students.
eligibility: Female-identifying, enrolled or enrolling in accredited US institution

title: AANP Scholarship Program
description: Scholarships for nurse practitioner students. Supports those pursuing NP certification and advanced practice.
eligibility: Enrolled in accredited NP program, AANP member or applying

title: SHPE Scholarship Program
description: Scholarships for Hispanic students in STEM. Multiple awards for undergraduate and graduate students.
eligibility: Hispanic/Latino, pursuing STEM degree, SHPE member

title: NSWCPA Education Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarships for accounting students. Supports undergraduate and graduate students pursuing CPA and accounting careers.
eligibility: Accounting major, enrolled in accredited program, NSWCPA member or eligible

title: Truman Scholarship
description: $30,000 merit-based scholarship for college juniors committed to public service leadership. Up to 60 awards annually.
eligibility: US citizen, college junior, nominated by institution, committed to public service
